curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies only the prepareOutput function in AbstractGenerator.php. The fix replaces a case-sensitive strpos check for 'phar://' with a parse_url + mb_strtolower whitelist approach. No sibling locations — Image.php and Pdf.php extend AbstractGenerator but do not override prepareOutput. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization (CWE-502) is correct: the vulnerability enables PHAR deserialization via case-insensitive wrapper bypass.
